positive: A mystical, symmetrical forest scene featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central composition of a glowing stag silhouette standing in a dense, otherworldly forest. Overhead, a nebula constellation gently connects the elements, forming intricate patterns. Style: Modern geometric linework combined with vibrant watercolor gradients. Color palette: Deep indigo, electric teal, glowing cyan, accented by warm golden yellows. High contrast, perfect for screen printing on dark apparel. Clean, sharp lines, highly detailed but flat graphic style.
negative: blurry, low quality, amateur, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, distorted, grainy
